info.title: MoltSets API
info.description: Identity resolution API. Resolve emails, LinkedIn profiles, IP addresses, and emails into enriched contact and company data.

bearerAuth.description: Pass your API key as a Bearer token. Keys follow the format `ms_XXXXXXXXXXX`.

tokens_charged.description: Credits consumed by this request. Always `0` when no data is returned.

message.example: The server cannot process the request due to a client error (400 Bad Request).
Message describing the nature of the invalid input.
No match was found for the data provided.
Rate limit exceeded. Maximum 100 requests per second.

post.description: Look up the best available email address for any LinkedIn profile. Returns a verified business email when one exists, and automatically falls back to a personal email if not — so you always get a result when data is available. The `type` field in the response tells you which kind was returned. Use this as your default LinkedIn-to-email enrichment endpoint when email type is not a constraint.

linkedin_url.description: Full LinkedIn profile URL or slug.

email.description: Email address found, or null if not found.

type.description: Whether the returned email is a business or personal address.

last_validated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last validation, or null.

post.description: Retrieve the verified business (work) email address for any LinkedIn profile. Only returns corporate email addresses — no personal inboxes. Use this when you need to reach contacts at their workplace domain, such as for B2B outreach, CRM enrichment, or account-based marketing campaigns. If you also want a personal email fallback, use `enrich_email` instead.

linkedin_url.description: Full LinkedIn profile URL or slug.

post.description: Retrieve the verified personal email address (such as Gmail or iCloud) for any LinkedIn profile. Useful for reaching contacts outside their work inbox — ideal for recruitment outreach, consumer marketing, or re-engagement campaigns where a personal address improves deliverability.

linkedin_url.description: Full LinkedIn profile URL or slug.

post.description: Look up the carrier-verified mobile phone number for a LinkedIn profile. Only mobile numbers are returned — no landlines or VoIP numbers — so every result is a real device. Supports both single lookups (`linkedin_url`) and batch lookups of up to 100 profiles at once (`linkedin_urls`). Use for SMS outreach, cold calling, or enriching sales sequences with direct-dial mobile numbers.

linkedin_urls.description: Batch of LinkedIn profile URLs, up to 100.

post.description: Resolve any email address to its associated LinkedIn profile slug. Useful for connecting a CRM contact or email list record back to a LinkedIn identity, enabling downstream enrichment, profile lookups, or social selling workflows. Pass a business or personal email and receive the LinkedIn slug for that person when a match exists.

Resolve an email address to the highest-confidence LinkedIn profile URL when multiple candidates exist. Unlike `hem_to_linkedin`, which returns a slug, this endpoint scores all matching profiles and returns the single best full LinkedIn URL. Use this when email-to-LinkedIn match quality is critical — for example, before personalising outreach, triggering enrichment workflows, or appending LinkedIn data to a contact record.

Resolve a LinkedIn profile URL into a complete business profile, including full name, job title, seniority, company name, company website, industry, revenue, verified business email, personal email, and optionally a carrier-verified mobile phone number. This is MoltSets's most complete LinkedIn enrichment endpoint — use it when you need a full picture of a contact and their employer in a single call. Set `include_mobile_phone: true` to append a direct-dial mobile number; additional credits apply when phone data is found.

include_mobile_phone.description: When true, attempts to include mobile phone in the response.

post.description: Resolve an email address into a complete business profile, including full name, job title, seniority, company, LinkedIn URL, firmographic data, and additional email addresses on file. Use this to enrich inbound leads, form fills, or email list records with everything you need to qualify and contact a prospect. Set `include_mobile_phone: true` to also return a carrier-verified mobile number when available; external credits apply when phone data is found.

include_mobile_phone.description: When true, attempts to include mobile phone. Costs external credits when data is found.

post.description: Identify the company or companies associated with an IPv4 address. Pass an IP from your website visitor logs, server request data, or analytics platform and get back the domain of the organisation behind that traffic. Best suited for B2B use cases — consumer ISP addresses will typically not resolve to a named company. Use this to de-anonymise B2B web traffic, trigger account-based workflows, or feed website visitor identification pipelines.

Retrieve your MoltSets account details, including account name, current plan, account status, remaining credit balance, number of API keys, and user count. Use this to programmatically check account health, verify active status, or display account information inside your own application or dashboard.

schema.description: No arguments required. Send an empty object.

unlimited.description: true if the account has unlimited credits

api_key_count.description: Number of API keys on the account

user_count.description: Number of users on the account

post.description: Retrieve your MoltSets billing details, including your current plan, subscription status, remaining credit balance, billing period start and end dates, and the credit cost for each available tool. Use this to monitor spend, confirm renewal dates, or display live billing information inside your own application.

schema.description: No arguments required. Send an empty object.

token_costs.description: Credit cost per tool call. Keys are tool names, values are integer credit costs.

post.description: Retrieve a detailed breakdown of your MoltSets API credit usage for a chosen time period — today, the past week, the past month, or the current billing cycle. Returns a day-by-day log of API calls made, credits consumed, successful lookups, empty results, and failed requests, along with period totals. Use this to track consumption trends, audit usage by day, or build internal usage dashboards.

period.description: Time window to report on. Defaults to `today`.

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Search and filter company and business profiles by name, domain, industry, size, or revenue.

tags.name: Get Verified Emails
tags.description: Resolve and enrich verified business and personal email addresses.

tags.name: Get Full Business Profile
tags.description: Resolve identifiers to full business profiles and company firmographics.

tags.name: Get Ad Audience
tags.description: Resolve identifiers to hashed email (HEM) and mobile advertising IDs (MAIDs) for audience matching.

tags.name: Get Company
tags.description: Resolve IP addresses to company data.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Account management tools. Free — do not consume credits.
